mission: close Hawking core by answering: does the functional student compose across the full model?
answer: NO. Independent per-layer functional students do not compose, on GLM (expansive residual) or DeepSeek (router divergence under cumulative drift), despite the escape existing and being locally strong on both.

cascade.depth: all 40 sparse MoE layers of the 43-layer model, validated streamed forward, 192 tokens
cascade.mechanism: router sensitivity under cumulative drift; the first student fits well but its small error drifts the hidden state until the next router re-selects experts (top-1 below half by L4), and mild per-layer amplification compounds over 40 layers into divergence. Structural, not a fit artifact.
cascade.escalation_out_of_scope: route-aware jointly-trained student (C2); directive says do not reopen the search space

glm_final_verdict: FUNCTIONAL_PARTIAL_ONLY (weight-space closed negative; functional escape expansive at every stratum, fails on propagation)

complete_model_bpw.caveat: billed at fp4-relative rates; a low BPW here is less impressive than on a BF16 parent because the source experts are already fp4. Not built as a servable candidate because the cascade did not promote.
complete_model_bpw.billed: payload + generator seed + protected organs + headers, over 158.07 B logical weights

runtime_path_working.complete_token_forward: DEMONSTRATED: the validated streamed forward runs embedding -> 43 layers (MLA + DSA + hyper-connections + fp4/fp8 MoE) -> logit lens -> greedy token, official DeepseekV4DecoderLayer with real dequantized weights, one block resident at a time on 96 GiB
runtime_path_working.gravity_adapter_block_token: PROVEN for GLM functional (one substituted MoE layer -> real block -> next-layer token); glm52.functional.moe.v1 .gravity codec, CPU authority, 3 parity-gated Metal grammars
runtime_path_working.attention_moe_integrated: the streamed forward integrates real MLA/DSA attention with the MoE end to end
runtime_path_working.embedding_to_logits_to_sampling: demonstrated via the streamed forward + logit-lens greedy sample

true_tps_measured.glm_functional_moe_path_measured: 6.3 -> 7.1 TPS (Metal FRT-B, submission-collapsed 76->1 command buffers), measured wall-clock, MoE-path only, GLM geometry

deepseek_complete_model_roofline.basis: measured 417.7 GB/s bandwidth / analytical active bytes per token; teacher 11.7 GB, functional 7.73 GB

true_tps_measured.wall_clock_served_tps: UNAVAILABLE: no resident compact model exists (both parents FUNCTIONAL_PARTIAL_ONLY); a served wall-clock TPS requires a promoted parent's compact representation resident, and the streamed forward is streaming-bound (weights re-dequanted per layer) so its wall-clock is not a served rate

flop_byte_energy_sealed.flop_byte_verdict: GLM FEWER_FLOPS_AND_BYTES; DeepSeek FEWER_BYTES_MODEST (attention is the binding organ because experts are already fp4, so the functional whole-token win is ~1.5x)
flop_byte_energy_sealed.active_bytes: GLM functional 12.58 MB/layer (48x less than teacher); DeepSeek functional token 7.73 GB vs teacher 11.7 GB
flop_byte_energy_sealed.energy: UNAVAILABLE (no accepted on-device source wired; none inferred)

overhead_collapse.per_layer_command_buffers: 1 (each functional MoE layer is one command buffer)
overhead_collapse.python_in_hot_loop: the Metal grammars run without Python in the kernel dispatch; the streamed reference forward is Python (measurement apparatus, not a production runtime)

frozen: load/unload lifecycle incl. one-block streamed residency

storage.glm_source: RELEASED (405.4 GB reclaimed); rehydration receipt, 76/76 shard sha256
storage.deepseek_source: RELEASED (159.6 GB reclaimed; terminal, cascade refuted); rehydration receipt, 46/46 shard sha256, meta + evidence + validated forward retained

durable_results: the null-first, amplification-first, cascade-decisive methodology and its metric contract
the validated streamed-forward apparatus: validate primitives vs the official transformers reference, stream one block at a time, use contextual inputs
the finding that single-layer amplification favourability does NOT imply full-model composition; the cascade is the decisive test
the functional .gravity codec, CPU authority, and parity-gated Metal grammars
GLM and DeepSeek both FUNCTIONAL_PARTIAL_ONLY by different mechanisms (expansion vs router-divergence-under-drift)

scoped_ascension.HAWKING_CORE_ASCENDED: methodology, metric system, .gravity substrate, source lifecycle, Apple runtime foundation, functional-runtime discovery, HIDE-facing architecture
scoped_ascension.cross_parent_functional_paradigm: CLOSED: independent per-layer functional students do not compose

next_phase: refactor, release selection, and HIDE completion. Do not reopen the functional search space. A route-aware jointly-trained student is the only identified path to composition and is a separate future research decision, not part of this closure.
not_evidence_of: capability, a servable model, or that no functional model of any parent is possible. It refutes the independent-per-layer-student paradigm and closes Hawking core on an honest, scoped basis.
